category_sources: source_facts.description says text-based journaling program; official diary site provides the DIARY(1) manual for journal files.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is diary; official repository and manual use the lowercase name diary/DIARY.
docs_sources: Official diary homepage provides the DIARY(1) manual page at /man.
repo_sources: Official source browser at code.in0rdr.ch/diary identifies the project as diary and shows the git clone URL git.in0rdr.ch/diary.git.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies text-based journaling; official DIARY(1) manual documents journal files, calendar behavior, and CalDAV configuration.
